name: Ratatouille--Version #1
recipeIngredient: 2 medium eggplants (or large size), peeled and cubed
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil in a large Dutch oven.
2. Add onions, garlic, eggplant, and peppers; sauté until vegetables are limp, about 8 minutes.
3. Stir in zucchini, tomatoes, tomato paste, and water. Bring to a boil.
4. Reduce heat to medium, cover, and simmer for 15 minutes.
5. Add herbs, salt, and pepper to taste. Continue cooking uncovered for about 10 more minutes.
6. Cool for 1 hour, stirring often.
7. Package in meal-sized portions, leaving 1-inch headspace.
8. Freeze. (10 - 12 Servings)
